# Growth Institute — Brand Guide for AI-Powered Page Building
*Generated by Impact OS on March 3, 2026*
*Source: https://www.growthinstitute.com/en/*

---

## 1. BRAND IDENTITY

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Brand Name | Growth Institute |
| Tagline | Scale Impact & Reduce Drama |
| Industry | Online Executive Education & Business Coaching |
| Target Audience | Founders and C-suite executives scaling businesses from $1M to $50M+ revenue, seeking proven methodologies, leadership frameworks, and peer community |
| Brand Personality | Authoritative, Premium, Results-Driven, Ambitious, Community-Focused |
| Website URL | https://www.growthinstitute.com/en/ |

## 2. COLOR SYSTEM (FUNCTION-MAPPED)

### Primary Palette

| Name | Hex | Used For |
|------|-----|----------|
| Page Background | `#0d0f1e` | Main page background for all sections, hero areas, and full-bleed dark panels — the deepest layer of every page |
| Card Background | `#242328` | Card surfaces, nav bar background, footer container, modal backgrounds, all elevated surfaces sitting above the page background |
| Primary CTA | `#6453e5` | All primary action buttons (Download Now, Contact Us, Back to Homepage, Master Business Growth Today), active nav states, category filter pills, label chips, focus rings |
| Accent / Highlight | `#897aeb` | Gradient endpoint for accent words within H1/H2 headings (linear-gradient from #6453e5 to #897aeb), hover tint on Primary CTA, decorative purple section labels like 'Our Purpose' |
| Heading Text | `#ffffff` | All H1, H2, H3 text, large stat numbers, card titles, bold navigation labels, any text requiring maximum contrast |
| Body Text | `#dddddd` | Paragraph copy, card descriptions, nav link text, footer link text, list items — slightly dimmed white to reduce eye strain on dark backgrounds |
| Secondary Text | `#949fa7` | Subtitles, instructor job titles, date stamps, caption text, meta information, stat labels beneath large numbers, helper text |
| Border / Divider | `rgba(100,83,229,0.15)` | Card borders, footer container outline, section separators, input field borders — subtle purple-tinted line that echoes the Primary CTA |

### Secondary / Utility Palette

| Name | Hex | Used For |
|------|-----|----------|
| Success | `#22C55E` | Success states, form confirmations, check mark icons |
| Warning | `#F59E0B` | Alert messages, caution banners |
| Error / Alert Accent | `#f04124` | Form validation errors, destructive action states; also the dominant color of the Scaling Up book cover imagery and some decorative icon fills repeated throughout the site — do not use as a UI CTA color |
| Glow / Aura | `rgba(100,83,229,0.15)` | Ambient radial-gradient background glow placed behind hero sections and bottom CTA blocks — Primary CTA (#6453e5) at 15% opacity |

## 3. TYPOGRAPHY

### Font Families

| Role | Font Family | Source / Import |
|------|-------------|------------------|
| Headings | Plus Jakarta Sans | Google Fonts |
| Body | Plus Jakarta Sans | Google Fonts |
| Accent / Display |  |  |

### Type Scale

| Element | Size | Weight | Line-H | Transform | Color Token |
|---------|------|--------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| H1 / Hero | 64px | 800 | 1.05 | none | Heading Text |
| H2 / Section | 44px | 700 | 1.1 | none | Heading Text |
| H3 / Card Title | 20px | 700 | 1.3 | none | Heading Text |
| Body | 16px | 400 | 1.65 | none | Body Text |
| Label / Overline | 13px | 600 | 1.4 | uppercase | Primary CTA |
| Caption / Small | 13px | 400 | 1.5 | none | Secondary Text |

## 4. COMPONENT STYLES

### Buttons

| Property | Primary Button | Secondary Button |
|----------|---------------|------------------|
| Background | #6453e5 | transparent |
| Text Color | #ffffff | #ffffff |
| Border | none | 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25) |
| Border Radius | 8px | 8px |
| Padding | 14px 32px | 13px 28px |
| Font Size | 15px | 15px |
| Font Weight | 600 | 600 |
| Hover Effect | background: #7465e8; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(100,83,229,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease | border-color: #6453e5; background: rgba(100,83,229,0.08); transition: all 0.2s ease |

### Cards & Containers

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Background | #242328 |
| Border | 1px solid rgba(100,83,229,0.15) |
| Border Radius | 16px |
| Padding | 28px 24px standard, 48px 40px large hero cards |
| Shadow | 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35) |

### Form Inputs

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Background | rgba(255,255,255,0.06) |
| Border | 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12) |
| Border Radius | 8px |
| Focus State | border-color: #6453e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(100,83,229,0.2) |
| Placeholder Color | #949fa7 |

## 5. SPACING & LAYOUT

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Max Content Width | 1200px |
| Section Padding | 96px top/bottom desktop, 60px mobile |
| Container Side Padding | 24px |
| Grid Gap | 24px between cards |
| Desktop Columns | 2-col for resource and course grids, 3-col for instructor/team and values grids, 3-col for pathway cards |
| Mobile Breakpoint | 768px — all multi-column grids collapse to 1 column |

## 6. DECORATIVE EFFECTS

| Effect | Description / CSS |
|--------|-------------------|
| Hero Purple Ambient Glow | background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 0%, rgba(100,83,229,0.25) 0%, transparent 60%) layered over the Page Background; used in hero sections and large CTA blocks to create depth without images |
| Heading Gradient Accent Word | Selected emphasis words in H1/H2 apply: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6453e5 0%, #897aeb 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text — examples: 'Top' in Top Thought Leaders, 'Approach' in Our Approach, 'Team' in Our Team |
| Card Hover Lift | transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; hover state: transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(100,83,229,0.2); applied to course cards, resource download cards, and pathway cards |
| Circular Purple Blob Glow | Absolute-positioned element with border-radius: 50%, width: 600px, height: 600px, background: rgba(100,83,229,0.15), filter: blur(80px), pointer-events: none; placed behind hero content and bottom CTA sections to create atmospheric depth |
| Section Background Alternation | Sections alternate between pure #0d0f1e and rgba(36,35,40,0.6) — a subtle elevated panel — to create visual rhythm and section separation without hard borders or sharp color jumps |
| 404 Large Type Glow | Oversized decorative text (404, large stat numbers) uses: color: transparent; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6453e5 0%, #522583 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; opacity: 0.4; positioned as an absolute background layer |

## 7. IMAGE LIBRARY

### Folder Structure

See the `brand-assets/` folder included in this package. Full inventory in `brand-assets/README.md`.

| Folder | Contents | Count |
|--------|----------|-------|
| /logos/ | Brand logos — light, dark, icon versions | 4 |
| /hero/ | Hero backgrounds, textures, dividers | 43 |
| /instructors/ | Founder/instructor headshots | 17 |
| /instructors/team/ | Team member photos | 37 |
| /testimonials/ | Customer headshot photos | 3 |
| /courses/ | Product/course thumbnails | 12 |
| /icons/ | UI icons, social icons, feature icons | 125 |
| /lifestyle/ | Professional photography, illustrations | 4 |
| /misc/ | Uncategorized assets | 25 |

### Image Placement Map

| Page Section | Image File | Notes |
|-------------|------------|-------|
| Hero Section | hero/hero-homepage-bg.jpg | Full-width dark background; course book mockup or platform dashboard visual placed to the left of or beneath the headline; purple ambient glow overlay layered on top; no heavy dark overlay needed if source image is already dark |
| Author / Instructor Profile Grid | instructors_team/instructor-[name].jpg | Circular mask, 80–100px diameter for team overview grids; larger 200–280px rectangular crop for individual course author hero panels; grayscale-to-color treatment optional on hover |
| Course Card Thumbnail | courses/course-[name].jpg | 16:9 aspect ratio, full-width within card container, border-radius applied to top corners only matching the 16px card radius, no dark overlay; thumbnail sits above the card text block |
| Resource / Free Tool Download Card | misc/resource-[name].jpg | Square or 4:3 crop in the upper half of the resource card; slight dark overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) acceptable to ensure card title legibility if image is light |
| Testimonial / Social Proof | testimonials/testimonial-[name].jpg | Circular avatar, 56–64px diameter, left-aligned beside the quote text block; five-star rating row rendered above the quote in #f04124 or yellow; name and title below in Secondary Text color |
| Book / Product Mockup CTA | hero/book-scaling-up-mockup.png | Used in mini-course CTA and membership join sections; drop-shadow applied (box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)), no border-radius; placed left of text block on desktop (50/50 split), stacked above text on mobile |
| Social Media Brand Cards | icons/social-linkedin.svg, icons/social-instagram.svg, icons/social-youtube.svg | Large social platform icon centered in a Card Background (#242328) tile with Primary CTA border; LinkedIn card spans full width on left, Instagram and YouTube stack on right in a 2:1 column layout |
| Pathway / Product Cards (Master Courses, Learning Hub, Consulting) | courses/pathway-[name].jpg or hero/pathway-[name].jpg | Thumbnail image fills top third of pathway card; card has dark overlay gradient (linear-gradient from transparent to #242328) over image bottom edge to blend into card body text; 3-column grid desktop |

## 8. LOGO USAGE

| Context | Logo Version & Size |
|---------|--------------------|
| Page Header / Nav | White logo mark (angular slash/chevron icon) + 'GROWTH INSTITUTE' uppercase wordmark side-by-side, total lockup height: 36px, top-left aligned in nav bar |
| Footer | Same white logo mark + wordmark lockup, height: 32px, bottom-left aligned within the footer card container |
| Favicon | Standalone slash/chevron icon mark only, 32x32px, white on transparent or dark background |
| Minimum Clear Space | At least 16px on all sides of the full logo lockup; logo always appears on dark (#0d0f1e or #242328) or purple surfaces — never on light or white backgrounds |
